description: Configure the wiki's global identity by setting the Site Title to 'Kafka Docs' and the Site Subtitle to 'Event Streaming Platform Reference'. Create a homepage tiddler titled 'Kafka Knowledge Base' containing a welcome message and an interactive button labeled 'Add Concept'. The button must trigger the `tm-new-tiddler` message to create a new draft tiddler titled 'New Concept' tagged with 'Concept'. Set the wiki's Default Tiddlers so that only 'Kafka Knowledge Base' opens when the wiki loads.
